storyInfo: Titi returns to Sargon, her mission complete. In Minos, the rebuilding of the First Temple is only the beginning...

attributes.content: Medication and suppressants that need to be administered on a regular basis, fresh from the Rhodes Island office.
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: I heard the Astynomos' Office has lifted the detention order on Xanthos and his apprentice, and does not intend to press charges against you for helping them escape.
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: Yes. I learned later that Lydia had guessed our plan and intentionally made things easy for me. Stands to reason she wouldn't pursue the matter.
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: But the three of you still intend to leave Athenius?
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: Staying will only give my old classmate ideas. He needs to see more places, meet more people, do more things.
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Lykeion

attributes.content: I rarely see you so honest, Lykeion. I wouldn't have had three operators keep an eye on you, if you were like this when you were my patient.
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: Sorry for the trouble I caused...
attributes.name: Lykeion

attributes.content: Looks like Xanthos's actions at the First Temple had a considerable influence on you.
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: How about you wave the white flag and admit that Oripathy doesn't sap the heroic spirit at all?
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: In your dreams.
attributes.name: Lykeion

attributes.content: Talk about a hardhead.
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: You should go, or you'll miss the ferry. Xanthos's substitute is not as flexible about late passengers. He won't wait for you.
attributes.name: Lena
Hekádemos
attributes.content: Skata! Let's go, Lykeion.

attributes.name: Hekádemos
attributes.content: Thank you for the medicine, Kyría Athopoulou. May we meet again!
Hey, stay off the lawn! I just worked on it—
attributes.name: Lena
Lena
attributes.content: Well, I suppose two young men won't be nearly as destructive as a whole herd of burdenbeasts.

attributes.name: Lena
attributes.content: The flowers and grass they ruined haven't been cleaned up yet. Too bad about the blue boronia...
Don't cry, Lydia...
attributes.name: Young Lena

attributes.content: If bad guys ruin your house like they ruined my old home...
attributes.name: Young Lydia

attributes.content: We won't have a home to go back to. What would we do?
attributes.name: Young Lydia

attributes.content: Don't worry. I'll never leave you behind, even if the house is gone, even if we're separated!
attributes.name: Young Lena

attributes.content: I know! Look for this garden if you're far away from home and don't know the way back.
attributes.name: Young Lena

attributes.content: Garden...?
attributes.name: Young Lydia

attributes.content: Yeah! I'll plant blue boronia here, so that you'll know you're home when you see it.
attributes.name: Young Lena

attributes.content: And if you find the way first, mark it the same way, won't you?
attributes.name: Young Lena

attributes.content: Alright... it's a promise, Lena.
attributes.name: Young Lydia

attributes.content: The public garden's lawn, once filled with flowers and herbs, is now filled only with burdenbeast footprints.
Even if it has temporarily lost its beauty, however, the blue petals remain in the soil.
So many blue boronias... you think of the past too, don't you?
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: Thank you, Lydia. I'm home.
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: I brought this year's apples, Kassandra!
attributes.name: Fruit Farmer Rep

attributes.content: The portion set aside for the temple's offering has been sent to the cellar. I saved this for you and the others at the temple to share.
attributes.name: Fruit Farmer Rep

attributes.content: Thank you. It's very kind of you, to do it every year.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: Our good harvests are all thanks to the help of everyone in Athenius. Besides, you helped so much with coordinating the temple.
attributes.name: Fruit Farmer Rep

attributes.content: You seem to be in a good mood today.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: To us, nothing matters more than the harvest, and a good harvest brings happiness.
attributes.name: Fruit Farmer Rep

attributes.content: Nothing matters to us more than everybody's happiness, and the harvest is an important part of it.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: We're counting on you! I'll take my leave now. The pomegranate will be ripe for harvest soon, and there are branches waiting to be trimmed.
attributes.name: Fruit Farmer Rep

attributes.content: Sweet apples and bright sun. What a lovely day!
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: The ceremony at the First Temple was successfully concluded, and the ferryman that you were caring for has found hope.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: All is well, isn't it, Hiéreia? Why do you look so sullen?
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: You're the one I'm worried about.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: Me? Why?
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: I've been thinking about what you said when you came back to Athenius.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: You said you saw the beginnings of Minos in your dreams, saw Kereseira and her First Temple.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: You said you thought a lot about Minos's past and future, about your own goals and direction.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: All this is why you came back.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: The events of recent days seem to corroborate my interpretation of the divine revelation. It is not a beautiful future of smiles and flowers. The unease lingers in my heart.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: Divine revelation is simply the direction that the spirit of heroes has shown us. It is not an inevitable future. We learned about that in priest school.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: That's true for ordinary revelations, but...
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: For example, I wanted the harp to return, but the peculiar manner of its return makes it seem so inevitable and unchangeable...
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: Look at it from a different perspective. While the final goal was the return of the harp, the manner of its return was wondrous. Perhaps it's the same for my revelation.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: Or perhaps, your interpretation is not the final goal. It's only one of the trials during the process, and the goal lies elsewhere.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: ...I hope you're right.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: Besides, the recent events have demonstrated that it was right for me to come back. Minos needs me, and I need it.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: But you don't want to take over the First Temple, despite the fact that the bulk of the work is done.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: Is it because you believe your Oripathy will be an obstacle to priesthood? But Xanthos has told me about the vision he saw on the temple square. I thought you didn't worry anymore.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: Traditions can be changed. You were right. I can initiate a vote at the council...
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: No, I didn't propose rebuilding the First Temple to become its priestess.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: I wanted to unite our spirit, not just Athenians, but other city-states and Minoans too...
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: I heard Lachedamon and Corinia have changed a lot. I want to see them for myself.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: So you did come to say goodbye.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: Not quite yet. I want to see the temple project through to the end. I'm not missing the completion party that Kantia is already planning!
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: Carefree as always.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: Thank you for the kind invitation. It was quite an unexpected play.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: Athenius is about to depart along its planned route, and it's time for us to depart as well.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: I hope you will excuse the unpredictable events that occurred. It seems I did not plan for every possible contingency.
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: On this, there is something I'm curious about.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: The ferryman openly accused you of making secret deals with the Sargonians on the temple square, and you were summoned to the council yesterday for an emergency hearing.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: Yet you are back in your office, safe and sound. Did you have a trump card up your sleeve? Or is there more to this matter than meets the eye?
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: More than meets the eye' is overstating it. I had simply made certain arrangements for the follow-up to this matter. The council heard the explanation and is satisfied that I remain competent to govern.
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: As for the details, I regret that I am unable to share them as yet. They will reveal themselves in due time.
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: All we need to know is that you remain the Astynomos of Athenius.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: With sweeping authority over major matters of administration and governance.
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: I'm glad to hear it. And now, I have a formal proposal to make.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: I'm sure both of you understand that dramatic changes are happening in Minos right now.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: It is the case in Athenius, and it is the case in Lachedamon, where a new arena is being built, one that will host competitors from far and wide.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: Perhaps the word 'tradition' is not quite music to your ears, Astynomos, but don't you think that now is the time for us to revive the old traditions?
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: Changes are happening across the land. How about the Three Poleis set aside their rivalries, return to the old city-state federation, and revive an ancient festival?
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: The scattered villages and minor poleis will surely answer the call, and the nation will grow stronger.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: It will be the perfect opportunity, to restore Minos's glory, and to spread the sacred flame across the land.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: What do you think?
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: Is this why you've been snooping around Athenius? You were investigating us.
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: Old merchant habits die hard. Can't go into the market without doing research. I apologize if I caused any offense.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: You're good at causing accidents. I'm afraid I can't give you an answer right now.
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: That's not a problem. It's right to be prudent.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: What about you, priestess Cynisca of Lachedamon?
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: I cannot make decisions for Lachedamon by myself. However, there is one thing of which I'm sure—
attributes.name: Cynisca

attributes.content: Lachedamon never turns down a challenge.
attributes.name: Cynisca

attributes.content: I'll take you across the river, then you should go directly back to Sargon.
attributes.name: Xanthos
Titi
attributes.content: Man, I feel like a prisoner being deported—

attributes.name: Titi
attributes.content: Just kidding.
I understand your friendship towards Minos. But you are still Sargonian, nonetheless.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: And I have a hard time abiding Sargonian feet upon the soil of Minos.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: ...I understand.
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: I've been thinking whether there's anything else I can do for Minos, for the mistakes of my forefathers.
attributes.name: Titi
Titi
attributes.content: Whether I should leave the engineering notes of the Three Poleis and bring only the blueprints back—

attributes.name: Titi
attributes.content: After all, the padishah only told me to bring back 'blueprints'.
Then I thought, it wasn't enough—it's just a half-hearted compromise, an excuse to run away from my responsibilities and lessen the feeling of guilt.
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: I should bring them back and display them in my museum, so that the Sargonians can see it and know that their history books are lying.
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: Your padishah won't be happy about it.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: Who cares? My family wasn't ever particularly good at making the padishahs happy.
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: Besides, I met with your Astynomos, that shrewd Vulpo, yesterday. I learned that she had already made preparations in advance.
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: She had scholars compile and photocopy all the documents and even wrote a paper on it, to be published in a Columbian journal once the exchange was complete and I brought the documents back.
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: She asked me to write a foreword, from the perspective of a Sargonian, providing endorsement for the paper.
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: And she wanted to leverage the connections I built while studying in Columbia to invite experts to study these invaluable historical records.
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: She said she would name me an honorary Minoan for this!
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: ...I admire your courage.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: Just doing what my father couldn't.
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: Besides, I enjoyed my time in Athenius. I went to see the priestess of Endymion Temple yesterday, and she said the vision I saw on stage was a divine revelation!
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: It was a surprise, because the books said Minoan divine revelations only happened in dreams.
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: Divine revelations can occur in the form of dreams, visions or voices, but dreams are the most frequent form they take, because they are an important way for us to interact with the spirits of the heroes and the departed.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: That's what the priestess said. I told her about the vision I had on the stage, and the dream I had at the burdenbeast ranch. She gave me a very detailed analysis.
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: Finally she told me, in that solemn and mysterious tone, 'You may not believe it now, Kyría Mashayer, but I believe your revelation is a sign that you will one day become a padishah.'
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: How did she get that? She wasn't messing with me, was she?
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: I'm an honorary Minoan now. I'll actually believe what the priestess of Endymion tells me!
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: ...You're free to believe. Divine revelations are simply a form of guidance. Believe in it, and it will bring you strength.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: Perhaps a lot of tragedies could have been avoided if a padishah like you ruled over the Sargonian border.
attributes.name: Xanthos
Titi
attributes.content: Hm, I think I understand now.

attributes.name: Titi
attributes.content: Then I'll take it as a sign of the responsibility I may have to bear in the future—I'll do my best.
This public announcement... is it a referendum?
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: I'm going back to Athenius after I take you across the river.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: The citizens of Athenius will vote on whether to banish me from the city for my recent actions.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: But you did it for Minos—
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: Regardless of the reason, I must face judgment for my actions. It is the responsibility I must bear.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: It's time. Let's go, Kyría Mashayer.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: I saw Ithakos again in the vision, as well as the river of my homeland.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: Was it still red with blood, as it was in your dreams?
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: No, it was quiet and gentle, as I remembered it; not pristine, but carrying the sand and mud that nourishes the soil and life.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: A beautiful revelation. You'll be able to take up poems again, no matter where you go.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: ...Yes.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: Whatever the result of the referendum, whether he stays in or leaves Athenius, Xanthos will accept it with grace.
He walks towards the square.
Three months later...

Look at this letter from a Lateran scholar—'A most stunning revelation. The study of history is a continuous process of seeking the truth by eliminating misconceptions. I am impressed by the courage that your nation has demonstrated.'
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: And this editorial in a Columbian newspaper—'Sargon shows integrity through proper recognition of history.'
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: I've been calling in favors every single day to repair the damage you've done, ever since that special exhibit that you held after getting back from Minos!
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: I hope you understand that such maverick methods only work once.
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: If anything like this happens again, you'd better think about what you'll do once you're removed as curator of the Varjavandabad Museum.
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: Is this your will, or the padishah's?
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: Is there a difference? My will is the padishah's will.
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: I thought we had a consensus before we left Minos—
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: The success of the exchange ceremony and the mission of friendship with Minos is all thanks to your leadership. In turn, it will be your responsibility to explain things to the padishah.
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: However much or little you say is entirely up to you, as long as the padishah's happy.
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: The exchange ceremony was completed under my leadership to begin with! Besides, how was I to know that you would be so audacious as to...!
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: Don't think you're in the clear just because I smoothed things over for you this time. There won't be a next time.
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: Besides, and don't you dare say I didn't warn you—this matter has had a significant impact far and wide. My connections have told me that the City of Gold has sent a herald to Menat-Ha'mait.
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: You WILL watch your words and behavior from now on.
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: I see that news of my mission precedes me.
S-Such noble elegance and dignity! You must be the herald of the Shahanshah!
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: Your presence honors this humble museum. Have you come to see the exhibits?
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: If you want to see the new special Minoan exhibit, I can...
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: You stay put! I will guide the exalted herald.
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: The exhibit can wait. I came to communicate the Shahanshah's will.
His Majesty has heard of the mission from Menat-Ha'mait to Minos, and he is most interested.
Y-You came to escort me? I-It's my greatest honor!
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: My family is one of the most honored houses in this land. It was always my greatest dream to serve the Shahanshah in the City of Gold. I knew that one day I would...
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: It's not you I seek, effendi. Kindly close your mouth, for it is making too much noise.
Medjehtiqedti Nasutu Mashayer. His Majesty awaits your presence in the City of Gold, that the King of Kings might hear of your time in Minos, in your own words.
You should make your preparations quickly. The Shahanshah is eager to hear from you. Do not keep him waiting.
Of course!
attributes.name: Titi
